sg_activity: Announced its first Southeast Asia flagship showroom at Raffles City, opening this September.
buying_signal: New flagship showroom opening in Singapore
next_action: Offer white-glove delivery site visit before showroom fit-out completes
outreach_subject: Raffles City opening — bulky delivery ready?
outreach_body:
Saw the announcement that Nordhaus Living is opening its first SEA flagship at Raffles City this September. Showroom furniture retail lives or dies on delivery experience — our white-glove teams handle assembly-on-delivery for bulky items across Singapore daily, backed by 200,000 sq ft of warehousing for your floor stock and customer orders. Worth a 15-minute call to compare notes on your launch logistics? Happy to host a site visit too.

{SENDER_NAME}, {SENDER_TITLE}, ULD

sg_activity: Appointed a Singapore distributor for its premium matcha and confectionery lines.
next_action: Pitch bonded storage + customs coordination for food imports
outreach_subject: Your new SG distribution — bonded storage
outreach_body:
Congratulations on appointing your Singapore distributor for the matcha and confectionery range. Imported F&B typically ties up cash in GST the moment it lands — our bonded, zero-GST warehouse defers that until stock actually moves, and our customs team handles food import permits daily. If useful, a quick 15-minute call could map how your first shipments flow in. 

{SENDER_NAME}, {SENDER_TITLE}, ULD

sg_activity: Raised SGD 12M Series A for SEA expansion and is hiring a Warehouse Operations Manager in Singapore.
outreach_subject: Scaling fulfilment after your Series A
outreach_body:
Noticed Voltride's Series A announcement and the Warehouse Operations Manager role you're hiring for. Before committing to your own facility, it may be worth comparing numbers against outsourced fulfilment — we run e-commerce fulfilment and same-day last-mile from 200,000 sq ft in Singapore, so you scale without the fixed cost. Open to a 15-minute call this week?

{SENDER_NAME}, {SENDER_TITLE}, ULD

activity.text: Intro email sent to Priya Nair (Operations Director)

sg_activity: Entering the Singapore market with a showroom at Great World City and container shipments arriving monthly.
next_action: Prepare quotation for unstuffing + white-glove delivery
outreach_subject: Container unstuffing for Great World City
outreach_body:
Welcome to Singapore — saw the Great World City showroom news. Monthly container arrivals of premium furniture need careful unstuffing and staged delivery; our transloading teams and white-glove crews handle exactly that flow for European furniture brands. Could we walk your ops lead through a typical container-to-showroom run in 15 minutes?

{SENDER_NAME}, {SENDER_TITLE}, ULD

activity.text: Outreach sent to operations team via distributor introduction
Ops lead replied — monthly container volume confirmed, wants pricing
Preparing quotation: unstuffing + white-glove, est. 2 containers/month

Peak-season replenishment is where store distribution gets tested — we run retail distribution into every major Singapore chain with same-week onboarding, from 200,000 sq ft of local warehousing. Fancy a 15-minute call about your Q4 flow before the rush?

{SENDER_NAME}, {SENDER_TITLE}, ULD

We run cross-border distribution for medical consumables out of 200,000 sq ft here, with bonded storage and customs coordination in-house — happy to respond formally, but a 15-minute call first would let us tailor the submission to your actual flows. When suits?

{SENDER_NAME}, {SENDER_TITLE}, ULD
